objectiveLocalePatches.description: ID-keyed objective patches for locale-sensitive objective text

description: Schema for a single locale's corrections (src/overrides/locales/<locale>.json5). The file name determines the locale code (e.g. en.json5 -> en). Locale overrides patch broken translation bundles only; they are not data corrections and apply only when the consumer renders the matching locale.
